name: a profile that does not mention the tool-native rule leaves the tool's red verdict intact on the routed path
command:
printf 'import os
' > x.py && printf 'name: t
extends: []
rules:
  some-other: off
' > q.yaml && if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file x.py --profile q.yaml 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' e.txt && grep -q 'disabled=0' e.txt && echo routed-omit-keeps-red 1>&2; else echo routed-omit-keeps-red 1>&2; fi
